hero.name: Vyshnav P C
hero.sub: Fullstack-focused software engineer from Kannur, Kerala with ~2 years of experience building scalable web applications. Specializing in the MERN Stack, REST APIs, authentication systems, and Kubernetes-based deployments.

bio_paragraphs: Backend-focused full-stack software engineer with 2 years of professional experience specializing in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js). Proven expertise in designing modern backend architectures, building secure RESTful APIs, and developing distributed systems.

Adept at managing cloud deployments, handling MongoDB Atlas clusters, and utilizing Next.js for high-performance user interfaces. Committed to leveraging Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud-native technologies to build reliable, scalable applications that meet business objectives.

achievements.title: Team Player Award
achievements.desc: Recognized for strong collaboration and consistent contribution to project deliverables at Neutrinos.

achievements.title: Beyond the Call of Duty Award
achievements.desc: Recognized for taking additional responsibilities and resolving critical production issues beyond assigned tasks.

highlights: Engineered and deployed 15+ high-performance RESTful APIs utilizing Node.js and Strapi CMS for enterprise clients (Sunlife PH, HNI), automating core insurance workflows such as policy generation and system communications.
Architected a dynamic, stage-based decision API to manage complex application state logic, ensuring role-specific, context-aware decision paths (e.g., tailored UI flows for Reviewers).
Contributed to robust policy lifecycle automation systems, streamlining underwriting and complex processing workflows for large-scale implementations.
Collaborated with cross-functional agile teams to troubleshoot and resolve critical production issues, optimizing API logic to enhance backend reliability and reduce response times.
Participated actively in application deployment, release management, and cloud environment configuration to ensure continuous delivery and system stability.

certificates.name: Learn DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform and Azure DevOps
certificates.description: Comprehensive DevOps training covering containerisation with Docker, orchestration with Kubernetes, infrastructure as code with Terraform, and CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps.

certificates.name: Namaste JavaScript
certificates.description: In-depth JavaScript course covering core language internals — execution context, closures, prototypes, async patterns, and the event loop.

certificates.name: Claude Code in Action
certificates.description: Official Anthropic course on using Claude Code for agentic AI-assisted software development in real-world engineering workflows.

certificates.name: Namaste Node.js
certificates.description: In-depth Node.js course covering internals, event loop, APIs, and microservices.

contact.lead: I'm a Node.js developer who can handle everything from building solid backend APIs to clean UIs and full deployments. Got a project? Let's ship it together!
contact.sub: Feel free to reach out — I'd love to connect and discuss how I can contribute to your team or project.

know_more.subject: I didn't start as a backend engineer. I started with curiosity, a laptop, and way too many browser tabs. Follow the honest, unfiltered story of how I went from blinking cursors to production Kubernetes clusters.

projects.title: Domain Scanner
projects.description: Engineered a full-stack risk assessment platform designed to analyze web domains and determine security vulnerability levels using React.js for the frontend and Node.js/Express.js for backend services.

projects.title: SSO
projects.description: An authentication server for the application assocaited with vyshnavpc.com
